name: Tee Time Suites
address: 3624 E Highlands Ranch Pkwy #205, Highlands Ranch, CO 80126
about: Tee Time Suites is a private, unstaffed indoor golf simulator venue located in Highlands Ranch, Colorado. The facility is centered around a single, high-end Trackman4 simulator bay that provides members with exclusive access to golf simulation. Members operate the space through a proprietary app, using a personalized barcode for entry, which allows for complete privacy and convenience. The venue operates on a capped membership basis and provides in-house coaching options for those looking to improve their game.
why_golfers_like_it: Ultimate privacy with a no-staff, fully automated space accessed via a personalized barcode
Premium Trackman4 technology in the largest screen size available (16'W x 9'H)
The flexibility and convenience of booking sessions entirely through the mobile app

food_and_drink.notes: BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is implied, as the venue is unstaffed. No on-site kitchen or food service is mentioned.
BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) is implied, as the venue is unstaffed. No on-site bar is mentioned.

simulator_hardware.notes: Single simulator bay featuring the latest Trackman4 technology with the largest available screen size (16'W x 9'H)

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own golf clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to bring their own golf clubs and other personal golf equipment to use during their session.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: Yes, as an unstaffed venue, Tee Time Suites operates on a BYOB (Bring Your Own Beverage) policy. Members can bring their own food and drinks to enjoy in the lounge area.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Standard hourly sessions are booked for 50 minutes of golf time. To play a full 18 holes, members would need to book two consecutive one-hour sessions.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly or suitable for juniors?
faq.answer: The venue is marketed as a private, unstaffed space for adults. The FAQ section specifically addresses lessons with a professional coach, suggesting the primary focus is on serious golf practice rather than family or junior-oriented activities.
